staticText: Deterministic browser-local discount calculator in English, French and Swahili. Original subtotal equals user-entered unit price times integer quantity. Up to five user-entered discounts are applied sequentially, with each percentage applied to the already-discounted price. Pre-tax savings equal original subtotal minus discounted subtotal. Effective discount is derived from the combined sequential-discount factor. An optional user-entered tax scenario applies only to the discounted subtotal; it is shown separately and never changes pre-tax savings or effective discount. Final total equals discounted subtotal plus the entered tax amount. Currency or unit text is display-only. AfroTools supplies no VAT or tax rate, retailer offer, price feed, promotion eligibility, invoice, rounding rule or currency conversion. Inputs are not persisted, sent, placed in URLs or recorded as analytics values. Native exports are local and disabled until a valid current result exists.
